title: chore(deps): update dependency wdio-visual-regression-service to v0.9.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| wdio-visual-regression-service | devDependencies | minor | `0.8.0` -> `0.9.0` | [source](https://togithub.com/zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service</summary>

### [`v0.9.0`](https://togithub.com/zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service/releases/v0.9.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service/compare/v0.8.0...v0.9.0)

-   Support [Spectre](https://togithub.com/wearefriday/spectre) as visual regression method ([#​66](https://togithub.com/zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service/issues/66),  [#​77](https://togithub.com/zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service/issues/77))
-   Process image operations in parallel ([#​76](https://togithub.com/zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service/issues/76))
-   Provide all test information into context ([#​47](https://togithub.com/zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service/issues/47))
-   Support Cucumber ([#​75](https://togithub.com/zinserjan/wdio-visual-regression-service/issues/75))

</details>
